title: Mangal Chalisa
intro: Shri Mangal Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Lord Mangal
description:
|| Shri Mangal Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Jai-jai Mangal mor, kripa karo guru dev.
Sankat sab har haro, kari Mangal sada sev.||

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Mangal grah muni pujit, shubh phal dayak nath.
Dhatu rudhir adhidev tam, sharanagat kare tran.||
Raktavarn tan sundar, mastak mukut virajat.
Gadahasth trinayan manohar, Mangal shubhphaldayak.||
Amit tej, bal, moh nashak, pingal tan ati shobhit.
Dharani putra ati, vaibhavshali, paap-tap sab harta.||
Astra, shastra, gada dharan kar, rajat singh par savar.
Sapt dhatu ka ho pradata, vaidya, vidya sudhakar.||
Nyayapriya, dharmarat, bhutihari, mand gati se vikhyat.
Kundali dosh, ashubh prabhav, jeevan mein sab harta.||
Rajasthan pujit shiromani, guru grah ka abhasak.
Bhakta janon ka sankat harte, tum shubh Mangalkari.||
Buddhivardhak, gyandayak, dharm-arth-kam pradayak.
Trin-tap, vipada haro, kari sukhdayak Mangal.||
Mahabali veer vikram, tapatray haro apar.
Mangal grah ki kripa se, sakal Mangal ho sadhan.||
Rog-klesh, peeda haro, vidya-buddhi badhao.
Shatru, samast bhay haro, Mangal murti virajo.||
Rudra roop dhar, danav dalan, aap vinashak dusht.
Shatru nash, bhay nivaran, Mangal bhav bhay harta.||
Dheer, veer, Mangal roop, sankat mein sangi.
Mangal grah ki kripa se, sab manorath poor ho.||
Shiv ke charnon mein sheesh navayein, sur munijan vandit.
Mangal grah kripa karein, bhakta jeevan safal ho.||
Vighna, vipatti, sankat haro, shubh Mangal kari.
Mangal Chalisa jo padhe, sab sankat se mukt ho.||

|| Doha ||
Jai-jai Mangal mor, kripa karo guru dev.
Sankat sab har haro, kari Mangal sada sev.||

|| Iti Sampurnam ||
meaning:
|| Shri Mangal Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Jai-jai Mangal mor, kripa karo guru dev.
(Victory to you, O Mangal, please shower your grace, O Divine Guru.)
Sankat sab har haro, kari Mangal sada sev.||
(Remove all my troubles; I will always serve you, O Mangal.)

|| Chaupai ||
Jai Mangal grah muni pujit, shubh phal dayak nath.
(Victory to you, O Mangal (Mars), worshiped by sages, the Lord who grants auspicious results.)
Dhatu rudhir adhidev tam, sharanagat kare tran.||
(You are the deity of minerals and blood, the remover of darkness, and the protector of those who seek your refuge.)
Raktavarn tan sundar, mastak mukut virajat.
(Your body is blood-red and beautiful, with a crown adorning your head.)
Gadahasth trinayan manohar, Mangal shubhphaldayak.||
(Holding a mace, with three eyes, you are charming and the giver of auspicious results.)
Amit tej, bal, moh nashak, pingal tan ati shobhit.
(You possess boundless radiance and strength, you are the destroyer of delusion, and your yellowish-red body is very beautiful.)
Dharani putra ati, vaibhavshali, paap-tap sab harta.||
(You are the son of the Earth, extremely glorious, and the remover of all sins and sorrows.)
Astra, shastra, gada dharan kar, rajat singh par savar.
(Armed with weapons, missiles, and a mace, you are seated upon a silver lion.)
Sapt dhatu ka ho pradata, vaidya, vidya sudhakar.||
(You are the provider of the seven minerals, a physician, and the nectar of knowledge.)
Nyayapriya, dharmarat, bhutihari, mand gati se vikhyat.
(You are a lover of justice, devoted to righteousness, the remover of obstacles, and famous for your slow gait.)
Kundali dosh, ashubh prabhav, jeevan mein sab harta.||
(You remove all defects in the horoscope and all inauspicious influences in life.)
Rajasthan pujit shiromani, guru grah ka abhasak.
(Worshipped in Rajasthan, you are a jewel among planets and reflect the qualities of the Guru.)
Bhakta janon ka sankat harte, tum shubh Mangalkari.||
(You remove the crises of devotees; you are the auspicious bestower of well-being.)
Buddhivardhak, gyandayak, dharm-arth-kam pradayak.
(You are the enhancer of intellect, the giver of knowledge, and the provider of righteousness, wealth, and desires.)
Trin-tap, vipada haro, kari sukhdayak Mangal.||
(Remove the three types of miseries and dangers; be the happiness-giving Mangal.)
Mahabali veer vikram, tapatray haro apar.
(You are a mighty hero and valorous; remove the three immense miseries.)
Mangal grah ki kripa se, sakal Mangal ho sadhan.||
(Through the grace of planet Mangal, may all our endeavors be auspicious.)
Rog-klesh, peeda haro, vidya-buddhi badhao.
(Remove diseases, conflicts, and pain; increase our knowledge and intellect.)
Shatru, samast bhay haro, Mangal murti virajo.||
(Remove enemies and all fears; O auspicious form, please reside in our hearts.)
Rudra roop dhar, danav dalan, aap vinashak dusht.
(Taking the form of Rudra, you are the crusher of demons and the destroyer of the wicked.)
Shatru nash, bhay nivaran, Mangal bhav bhay harta.||
(You are the destroyer of enemies, the remover of fear, and the annihilator of worldly fears.)
Dheer, veer, Mangal roop, sankat mein sangi.
(You are patient, heroic, and auspicious in form; you are our companion in times of crisis.)
Mangal grah ki kripa se, sab manorath poor ho.||
(By the grace of planet Mangal, may all our wishes be fulfilled.)
Shiv ke charnon mein sheesh navayein, sur munijan vandit.
(We bow our heads at the feet of Lord Shiva; you are praised by gods and sages.)
Mangal grah kripa karein, bhakta jeevan safal ho.||
(May planet Mangal shower grace, so that the devotee's life becomes successful.)
Vighna, vipatti, sankat haro, shubh Mangal kari.
(Remove obstacles, disasters, and crises; O auspicious doer of good.)
Mangal Chalisa jo padhe, sab sankat se mukt ho.||
(Whoever reads this Mangal Chalisa becomes free from all crises.)

|| Doha ||
Jai-jai Mangal mor, kripa karo guru dev.
(Victory to you, O Mangal, please shower your grace, O Divine Guru.)
Sankat sab har haro, kari Mangal sada sev.||
(Remove all my troubles; I will always serve you, O Mangal.)

|| Iti Sampurnam ||

faq.q1: Why is the Mangal Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: Mars (Mangal) is the symbol of courage, energy, and strength. The Mangal Chalisa is recited to pacify 'Manglik Dosha,' boost physical energy, and attain success in endeavors that require boldness and initiative.
faq.q2: What is the most auspicious day to recite it?
faq.a2: Tuesday is dedicated to Mangal Dev. Therefore, reciting it on a Tuesday is considered the most effective way to seek his blessings.
faq.q3: Does the Mangal Chalisa help in controlling anger?
faq.a3: Yes, in astrology, Mars is associated with fire and temper. Regular recitation of the Chalisa helps in channeling this energy in a positive direction and aids in controlling unnecessary anger.
faq.q4: When should one start reciting it?
faq.a4: If you are affected by 'Mangal Dosha' in your horoscope, or if you often feel lethargy, weakness, or delays in work, you can begin the recitation on a Tuesday.
faq.q5: Is any special material required for this?
faq.a5: No, there is no need for complex items. If possible, offer red flowers (hibiscus or rose) and jaggery (Gur) or chickpeas as an offering (Bhog) to Mangal Dev.
